chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.78 of 2018 M/s Nadeem Textile Mills Ltd. Versus The Learned District Judge Karachi (Central) & another Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 09.09.2025 None present. -.-.- None is present on behalf of the appellant. There is no intimation either. On the last date of hearing also no one appeared on behalf of the appellant. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
